# Pull Request

## 📝 Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

Fixes # (issue number)

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Tests (adding or improving tests)
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvement

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Test coverage maintained/improved

**Test Configuration**:
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.10.2]
- MongoDB version: [e.g., 6.0.3]

**Test commands run**:
```bash
python test-api.py
python test-voter-protection.py
```

## 📋 Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added error handling where appropriate

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested the changes manually

### Documentation
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated docstrings for new functions/classes
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)

### Deployment
- [ ] My changes work in Docker containers
- [ ] I have updated requirements.txt if new dependencies were added
- [ ] Environment variables are properly documented
- [ ] Migration steps are documented (if applicable)

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots or GIFs to demonstrate the changes, especially for UI-related changes.

## 🔗 Related Issues

List any related issues or PRs:

- Closes #[issue_number]
- Related to #[issue_number]
- Depends on #[pr_number]

## 📋 Breaking Changes

If this is a breaking change, list what breaks and how to migrate:

- [ ] This PR introduces breaking changes
- [ ] Migration guide provided
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained where possible

**Breaking changes**:
- Change 1: [description and migration steps]
- Change 2: [description and migration steps]

## 🤔 Additional Notes

Any additional information, concerns, or questions for reviewers:

- Performance implications
- Security considerations
- Areas that need special attention during review
- Known limitations or future improvements needed

---

**For Reviewers**: Please check that the PR meets all requirements before approving. Pay special attention to security implications and breaking changes.
